summary:
Reinfections have been observed clinically despite initial immunity post-infection due to persistent virus shedding even months later; however, distinct case reports confirm genuine reinfection events involving detectable active replication. \boxed{\text{Yes}}

The summary focuses only on direct clinical observations supporting reinfection occurrence without discussing immune response mechanisms or vaccine effects.
